text: A zu, Keen yi Naawunni saani, a we paaliguso ba n boona Nodi, o gbinni n niŋi, gaa n chaŋina, a yi Idin wuluŋpusigu.
translated: The Zu, Keen of the Naawunni nation, has returned to Nodi, the land of our ancestors, to lead the people, to unite us, and to restore the Idin's sacred fire.

ref: Jacob said, “I have seen God face to face, and I am still alive.” So he named the place Peniel.
text: Niŋi n na, Yakubu yeli, “M nye Naawunni nufu niŋi, ka ma na mari nyevuri.” A zu, Yakubu digili niŋi yuuri Peniyel.
translated: Yakubu said, "I will not go to Naawunni anymore, for I have found Peniyel."

ref: God gave them his blessing and said: Have a lot of children! Fill the earth with people and bring it under your control. Rule over the fish in the ocean, the birds in the sky, and every animal on the earth.
text: Naawunni nafa ba, ka yeli, “Ya dogira biisi, a paali tiŋgbaŋŋu maa, ka nyaasira u, a mari daama, a yi koom puu koroto niŋi, saazu niinsi, a ni bini zaa n chaŋina tiŋgbaŋŋu maa niŋi.

text: O n yiira la, o sunzo gbaa o nosiŋkpaari mari. Lala zu ba digili o yuuri Yakubu. Jemanso Rabeeka ni dogi biisaa, ka Yisaaka niŋini yuma pisiyoobu. Isawu koosi o wurikoŋtiri

ref: The man said, “From now on, your name will no longer be Jacob. You will be called Israel, because you have wrestled with God and with men, and you have won.”
text: Niŋi n na, daba maa yeli u, “Za zinaa wara, e yuuri bi lee n niŋi Yakubu, e yuuri n niŋi Izireel, a kpali bo? E ni Naawunni ni niriba n mo, e nyaŋŋi ba la zu.”
translated: "You and I, what is this matter that troubles you, about Jacob and Esau, and their meeting? Is it not Naaman who returned alive from the river, and his leprosy was healed?"

ref: Rachel was at the point of death, and right before dying, she said, “I'll name him Benoni.” But Jacob called him Benjamin.
text: O n digili bii maa yuuri Benoni, o vuusini o baasigu vuusim, ka kpi. Ama bii maa ba digili o yuuri Benjamin.
translated: "In the digital world, Benoni is known as Basigu, but in the physical world, he is known as Benjamin."
